task.label: Require verification of the identity of the customer and the beneficial owner
Verify the identity of the customer and the beneficial owner

conditions.condition: before the establishment of a business relationship or the carrying out of the transaction

task.label: Allow verification of the identity of the customer and the beneficial owner to be completed during the establishment of a business relationship

conditions.condition: if necessary so as not to interrupt the normal conduct of business
where there is little risk of money laundering or terrorist financing

exception.description: By way of derogation from paragraph 1

conditions.condition: as soon as practicable after initial contact

task.label: Allow the opening of an account with a credit institution or financial institution

conditions.condition: provided that there are adequate safeguards in place to ensure that transactions are not carried out by the customer or on its behalf until full compliance with the customer due diligence requirements laid down in points (a) and (b) of the first subparagraph of Article 13(1) is obtained

exception.description: By way of derogation from paragraph 1

conditions.condition: until full compliance with the customer due diligence requirements laid down in points (a) and (b) of the first subparagraph of Article 13(1) is obtained by Member States

task.label: Obtain full compliance with the customer due diligence requirements

Require that a transaction is not carried out, a business relationship is not established, the transaction is not carried out, the business relationship is terminated, and making a suspicious transaction report is considered

conditions.condition: where an obliged entity is unable to comply with the customer due diligence requirements laid down in point (a), (b) or (c) of the first subparagraph of Article 13(1)

task.label: Carry out a transaction through a bank account

conditions.condition: where an obliged entity is unable to comply with the customer due diligence requirements laid down in point (a), (b) or (c) of the first subparagraph of Article 13(1)
where an obliged entity is unable to comply with the customer due diligence requirements laid down in point (a), (b) or (c) of the first subparagraph of Article 13(1)
where an obliged entity is unable to comply with the customer due diligence requirements laid down in point (a), (b) or (c) of the first subparagraph of Article 13(1)
where an obliged entity is unable to comply with the customer due diligence requirements laid down in point (a), (b) or (c) of the first subparagraph of Article 13(1)

task.label: Consider making a suspicious transaction report to the FIU

conditions.condition: where an obliged entity is unable to comply with the customer due diligence requirements laid down in point (a), (b) or (c) of the first subparagraph of Article 13(1)

task.label: Apply the first subparagraph to notaries, other independent legal professionals, auditors, external accountants and tax advisors

conditions.condition: only to the strict extent that those persons ascertain the legal position of their client, or perform the task of defending or representing that client in, or concerning, judicial proceedings, including providing advice on instituting or avoiding such proceedings

task.label: Require that obliged entities apply the customer due diligence measures
Apply the customer due diligence measures

conditions.condition: at appropriate times to existing customers on a risk-sensitive basis, including at times when the relevant circumstances of a customer change
